🎬 BetterHealth Interactive Videos

Mobile app interface walkthroughs built with Hyperframes

📱 How to Preview

  1. Click "▶ Play Video" on any card below
  2. Watch the interactive demo unfold
  3. Use Play/Pause and Reset buttons in the video
  4. Videos auto-play in a mobile phone frame (375x812px)
